mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_CARGO_INFO SET QUANTITY = QUANTITY + #{quantity}, TON = TON + #{ton}, SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY = SURPLUS_RIGHTS_QUANTITY + #{ton}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT T1.SHIP_NAME AS "shipName", T1.SCN AS "scn", T1.ID AS "shipvoyageId" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE T1 JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM T2 ON T1.ID = T2.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE T2.ID = #{id}

SELECT
T1.ID as "dispatchId", T1.NUM as "num", T1.EQUIPMENT_IDS as "equipmentIds", T1.EQUIPMENT_NAMES as "equipmentNames",
null as "dispatchId", null as "num", null as "equipmentIds", null as "equipmentNames",
M1.MAC_TYPE_CODE as "equipmentTypeCode", M1.MAC_TYPE_NAME as "equipmentTypeName" FROM M_MACHINE_TYPE M1
LEFT JOIN T_PRD_DISPATCH T1 ON M1.MAC_TYPE_CODE = EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE AND T1.DISPATCH_TYPE = '1' AND T1.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId}
AND T1.WORK_POSITION_CODE = #{workPositionCode}
ORDER BY M1.MAC_TYPE_CODE ASC

SELECT ID "storehouseId", STORAGE_YARD_NM "storehouseName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD WHERE STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '1' AND ID IN
#{storehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID "regionId", STORAGE_YARD_NM "regionName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD WHERE STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' AND ID IN
#{regionId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID "massId", STORAGE_YARD_NM "massName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD WHERE STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3' AND ID IN
#{massId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CARGO_INFO_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, CLEAN_MASS_SIGN, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, CLEAN_MASS_BY, CLEAN_MASS_BY_NAME, CLEAN_MASS_TIME FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND STOREHOUSE_ID = #{storehouseId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND REGION_ID = #{regionId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND MASS_ID = #{massId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CARGO_INFO_ID, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, CLEAN_MASS_SIGN, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, CLEAN_MASS_BY, CLEAN_MASS_BY_NAME, CLEAN_MASS_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storehouseId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storehouseName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{regionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{massId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{massName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cleanMassSign, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{cleanMassBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cleanMassByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cleanMassTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, PORT_STORAGE_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, INOUT_TYPE, INOUT_STORAGE_CODE, INOUT_STORAGE_NAME, WORK_TICKET_ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, CARGO_TALLY_ID, CARGO_TALLY_DETAIL_ID, INOUT_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CLEAN_MASS_SIGN, CARGO_MIX_RECORD_ID, CARGO_MIX_DETAIL_ID FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE PORT_STORAGE_ID = #{portStorageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL(ID, PORT_STORAGE_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME,PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID,MASS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, INOUT_TYPE, INOUT_STORAGE_CODE, INOUT_STORAGE_NAME, WORK_TICKET_ID,WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, CARGO_TALLY_ID, CARGO_TALLY_DETAIL_ID, INOUT_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME,CREATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CLEAN_MASS_SIGN,CARGO_TRANSFER_ID,CARGO_MIX_RECORD_ID,CARGO_MIX_DETAIL_ID)VALUES(#{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.portStorageId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.workDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{entity.classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.className, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.processDetailCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.processDetailName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.storehouseId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.storehouseName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.regionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.regionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.massId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.massName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entity.ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL},#{entity.inoutType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.inoutStorageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.inoutStorageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.workTicketId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.workTicketDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.cargoTallyId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.cargoTallyDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.inoutDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{entity.companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.cleanMassSign, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{entity.cargoTransferId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.cargoMixRecordId, jdbcType=BIGINT},#{entity.cargoMixDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT})
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE
ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
COMPANY_ID = #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
STOREHOUSE_ID = #{storehouseId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
STOREHOUSE_NAME = #{storehouseName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REGION_ID = #{regionId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
REGION_NAME = #{regionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MASS_ID = #{massId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
MASS_NAME = #{massName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QUANTITY = #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER},
TON = #{ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = #{cleanMassSign, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{updateByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CLEAN_MASS_BY = #{cleanMassBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
CLEAN_MASS_BY_NAME = #{cleanMassByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CLEAN_MASS_TIME = #{cleanMassTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

begin
UPDATE T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE
ID = #{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
COMPANY_ID = #{item.companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
COMPANY_NAME = #{item.companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_INFO_ID = #{item.cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
STOREHOUSE_ID = #{item.storehouseId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
STOREHOUSE_NAME = #{item.storehouseName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REGION_ID = #{item.regionId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
REGION_NAME = #{item.regionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MASS_ID = #{item.massId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
MASS_NAME = #{item.massName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QUANTITY = #{item.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER},
TON = #{item.ton, jdbcType=DECIMAL},
CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = #{item.cleanMassSign, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{item.updateBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{item.updateByName, jdbcType=BIGINT},
UPDATE_TIME = #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=BIGINT},
CLEAN_MASS_BY = #{item.cleanMassBy, jdbcType=BIGINT},
CLEAN_MASS_BY_NAME = #{item.cleanMassByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CLEAN_MASS_TIME = #{item.cleanMassTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT};
end;
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, PORT_STORAGE_ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_ID, MASS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, INOUT_TYPE, INOUT_STORAGE_CODE, INOUT_STORAGE_NAME, WORK_TICKET_ID, WORK_TICKET_DETAIL_ID, CARGO_TALLY_ID, CARGO_TALLY_DETAIL_ID, INOUT_DATE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CLEAN_MASS_SIGN, CARGO_MIX_RECORD_ID, CARGO_MIX_DETAIL_ID FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE ID IN
#{portStorageDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE ID IN
#{portStorageDetailId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
